name: The Wrap
effect: Conclude production without documenting what was used or where it went. This card is considered complete.

clauses.name: COMPLETION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If no one asks for the asset list: The production is considered orderly.

clauses.name: DISCOVERY EFFECT
clauses.rule: When assets are later requested: Each asset is discovered in a different location by a different person.

clauses.name: FORGETFULNESS OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If the shoot is more than thirty days old: Everyone agrees there was definitely a list.
